productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Men Basic Perfume 75 ml
description: Drawing from basic minimalism, this Basic fragrance from nike fragrances, for men adds a touch of downtown cool with its mixed tones. Reminiscent of the retro-esque mood of the moment, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, is best for casual outings. Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
